docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME *****INVALIDATED DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF FILING FEES. ORDER STRIKING FILING ON DEC-01-2011.****** FILED BY PETITIONER MUSTAPHA, OLUWAFEYIKEMI OLUSTOSIN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-19-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES CONTINUED FROM OCT-19-2011 TO NOV-02-2011, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER REQUEST OF APPLICANT. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-02-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT OLUWAFEYIKEMI MUSTAPHA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: M. JONES; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
